lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਬਦੇ ਜਾਪਦਾ ਭਾਈ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo sabade jaapadaa bhaaee poorai bhaag milaae |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is realized through the Word of His Shabad, O Siblings of Destiny, which is found only by perfect destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਭਾਈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਤੀਆ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sukh sohaaganee bhaaee anadin rateea rang laae |1|
lines.english: The happy soul-brides are forever in peace, O Siblings of Destiny; night and day, they are attuned to the Lord's Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਹੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਿਹੋ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gaavahu gaavahu rang raatiho bhaaee har setee rang laae | rahaau |
lines.english: Sing, continually sing His Praises, imbued with His Love, O Siblings of Destiny; be in love with the Lord. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਚੜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jee too aape rang charraae |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, You Yourself color us in Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਭਾਈ ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee kaar kamaavanee bhaaee aap chhodd chit laae |
lines.english: Work to serve the Guru, O Siblings of Destiny; abandon self-conceit, and focus your consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਹਜੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa sehaj fir dukh na lagee bhaaee har aap vasai man aae |2|
lines.english: You shall be in peace forever, and you shall not suffer in pain any longer, O Siblings of Destiny; the Lord Himself shall come and abide in your mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਭਾਈ ਸਾ ਕੁਲਖਣੀ ਕੁਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: pir kaa hukam na jaanee bhaaee saa kulakhanee kunaar |
lines.english: She who does not know the Will of her Husband Lord, O Siblings of Destiny, is an ill-mannered and bitter bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਭਾਈ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manahatth kaar kamaavanee bhaaee vin naavai koorriaar |3|
lines.english: She does things with a stubborn mind, O Siblings of Destiny; without the Name, she is false. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਭਾਇ ਸਚੈ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: se gaaveh jin masatak bhaag hai bhaaee bhaae sachai bairaag |
lines.english: They alone sing the Lord's Praises, who have such pre-ordained destiny written upon their foreheads, O Siblings of Destiny; through the Love of the True Lord, they find detachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੇ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਭਾਈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਗੁਰ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin raate gun raveh bhaaee nirbhau gur liv laag |4|
lines.english: Night and day, they are imbued with His Love; they utter His Glorious Praises, O Siblings of Destiny, and they lovingly focus their consciousness on the Fearless Guru. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਸ ਦੀ ਵਡੀ ਹੈ ਦਾਤਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: so kiau manahu visaareeai bhaaee jis dee vaddee hai daat |5|
lines.english: How can we forget Him from our minds, O Siblings of Destiny? His gifts are glorious and great. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਲਦਾ ਭਾਈ ਸੋ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa maar jeevaaladaa bhaaee so sevahu din raat |
lines.english: He kills and revives all, O Siblings of Destiny; serve Him, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮੈਲੀ ਡੁੰਮਣੀ ਭਾਈ ਦਰਗਹ ਨਾਹੀ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mailee ddunmanee bhaaee daragah naahee thaau |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is filthy and double-minded, O Siblings of Destiny; the finds no place of rest in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਤ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਭਾਈ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai ta gun ravai bhaaee mil preetam saach samaau |6|
lines.english: But if she becomes Gurmukh, then she chants the Glorious Praises of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny; the meets her True Beloved, and merges in Him. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੁ ਜਨਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਭਾਈ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਦੇਸੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: et janam har na chetio bhaaee kiaa muhu desee jaae |
lines.english: In this life, she has not focused her consciousness on the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny; how can she show her face when she leaves?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿੜੀ ਪਵੰਦੀ ਮੁਹਾਇਓਨੁ ਭਾਈ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਨੋ ਲੋਭਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kirree pavandee muhaaeon bhaaee bikhiaa no lobhaae |7|
lines.english: In spite of the warning calls which were sounded, she has been plundered, O Siblings of Destiny; she yearned only for corruption. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਹਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਭਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਰੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: naam samaaleh sukh vaseh bhaaee sadaa sukh saant sareer |
lines.english: Those who dwell upon the Naam, O Siblings of Destiny, their bodies are ever peaceful and tranquil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਤੂ ਭਾਈ ਅਪਰੰਪਰ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal too bhaaee aparanpar gunee gaheer |8|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, dwell upon the Naam; the Lord is infinite, virtuous and unfathomable, O Siblings of Destiny. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 ghar 1 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਜਿਨਹਿ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag jineh upaaeaa bhaaee karan kaaran samarath |
lines.english: The One who created the whole world, O Siblings of Destiny, is the Almighty Lord, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਦੇ ਕਰਿ ਅਪਣੀ ਵਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd jin saajiaa bhaaee de kar apanee vath |
lines.english: He fashioned the soul and the body, O Siblings of Destiny, by His own power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਜਾਪੈ ਤਥੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur govind salaaheeai bhaaee jis te jaapai tath |1|
lines.english: Praise the Guru, the Lord of the Universe, O Siblings of Destiny; through Him, the essence is known. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਿ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਦੇਖੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਅਕਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: kin kaheeai kiau dekheeai bhaaee karataa ek akath |
lines.english: How can He be described? How can He be seen, O Siblings of Destiny? The Creator is One; He is indescribable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਜਪੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਵੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: mere man japeeai har bhagavantaa |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Lord, the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਇ ਜਨ ਅਪਨੇ ਦੂਖ ਦਰਦ ਕਾ ਹੰਤਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam daan dee jan apane dookh darad kaa hantaa | rahaau |
lines.english: He blesses His servant with the gift of the Naam; He is the Destroyer of pain and suffering. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਭਾਈ ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee keemat naa pavai bhaaee aoochaa agam apaar |
lines.english: His worth cannot be estimated, O Siblings of Destiny; He is lofty, inaccessible and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ghar sabh kichh hai bhaaee nau nidh bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: Everything is in His home, O Siblings of Destiny; His warehouse is overflowing with the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਦਾ ਭਾਈ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant pratipaaladaa bhaaee nit nit karadaa saar |
lines.english: He cherishes all beings and creatures, O Siblings of Destiny; he continually takes care of them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਹਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur pooraa bhetteeai bhaaee sabad milaavanahaar |2|
lines.english: So meet with the Perfect True Guru, O Siblings of Destiny, and merge in the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਚਰਣ ਸਰੇਵੀਅਹਿ ਭਾਈ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sache charan sareveeeh bhaaee bhram bhau hovai naas |
lines.english: Adoring the feet of the True Guru, O Siblings of Destiny, doubt and fear are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਂਜੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: mil sant sabhaa man maanjeeai bhaaee har kai naam nivaas |
lines.english: Joining the Society of the Saints, cleanse your mind, O Siblings of Destiny, and dwell in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟੈ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਅਗਿਆਨਤਾ ਭਾਈ ਕਮਲ ਹੋਵੈ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: mittai andheraa agiaanataa bhaaee kamal hovai paragaas |
lines.english: The darkness of ignorance shall be dispelled, O Siblings of Destiny, and the lotus of your heart shall blossom forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਭਾਈ ਸਭਿ ਫਲ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur bachanee sukh aoopajai bhaaee sabh fal satigur paas |3|
lines.english: By the Guru's Word, peace wells up, O Siblings of Destiny; all fruits are with the True Guru. ||3||
